title: Trace exactly what features and game/market context reach the model and recommendation layer today
objective: Determine exactly what features, game-state fields, and market-state fields reach the current model and recommendation layer, and identify which expected context is missing, dropped, or unused.
paper_only_note: This is paper-only / observation-mode work. No model implementation or live strategy change is authorized from this task.
forbidden_actions: Broad repo sweep outside the model input path
required_work: 1. Identify the exact feature/context fields available to the model at inference time.
2. Trace which fields survive into the recommendation object and bridge layer.
3. Identify any expected fields that are missing, compressed, stale-risk, or dropped before recommendation output.
4. Separate model inputs from post-model metadata and bridge-only fields.
acceptance_criteria: Exact feature/context inventory at the model boundary
Exact path from source state to recommendation output
verification: Quote exact code regions where core features are assembled
State which fields are model inputs vs recommendation metadata vs bridge pass-through
State what key context is absent or degraded
